series_metadata.series_title: Crime Victims Compensation Award Application Files
series_metadata.series_description: Documents application, review, and possible awarding of crime victim claims for supplemental assistance from the Ohio Victims of Crime Compensation Program per ORC 2743.56. Records include, but are not limited to, application for compensation, supporting documentation, medical records and reports, police reports, funeral expenses, insurance information, documents from Ohio Dept. of Jobs and Family Services (ODJFS) and Bureau of Workers Compensation (BWC), employment information, investigator notes and correspondence, and award decisions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: either award is satisfied, application is denied, no more supplemental reparations can be awarded, or award has reached maximum amount and all appeals have exhausted claim. ; Paper: either award is satisfied, application is denied, no more supplemental reparations can be awarded, or award has reached maximum amount and all appeals have exhausted claim. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
